title: 4TechUtilities ( shematic placer )
description:
Addon for other tech mods such like Mekanism. 
Include a modern schematic ( NBT ) placer
body:
# 4TechUtilities
## Content
This mod add a printer machine to the game allowing player to place their schematic in survival with block consumation and energy system.
This mod add seal that allow energy fluid and item to go trough.
## Compatibilites
Compatible with all other tech mods such as Mekanism, Thermal, ect
### Contribution
You can contribute to the project on the [github](https://github.com/Samuel-Chapuis/TechUtilities)
